zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie von Guelders於大約1327年出生在蓋爾德時，她的父親Reinoud II von Geldern33歲，母親Sophia van Berthout38歲。她於1362年12月25日與Wilhelm II. von Jülich結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1405年5月12日享年79歲。

zh-hans.Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Duitsland: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福
zh-hans.Arnhem, Gelderland, Netherlands: 荷兰蓋爾德藍德阿恩姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie von Guelders于大约1327年出生在蓋爾德时，她的父亲Reinoud II von Geldern33岁，母亲Sophia van Berthout38岁。她于1362年12月25日与Wilhelm II. von Jülich结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1405年5月12日享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie von Guelders was born about 1327, in Guelders, her father, Reinoud II von Geldern, was 33 and her mother, Sophia van Berthout, was 38. She married Wilhelm II. von Jülich on 25 December 1362. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 May 1405, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie von Guelders est née environ 1327, à Geldern, son père, Reinoud II von Geldern, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sophia van Berthout, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Wilhelm II. von Jülich le 25 décembre 1362. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1405, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie von Guelders um 1327 in Geldern geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reinoud II von Geldern 33 und ihre Mutter Sophia van Berthout 38. Sie hat am 25. Dezember 1362 Wilhelm II. von Jülich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1405 im Alter von 79 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie von Guelders è nata il circa 1327 nel Geldern, sua padre, Reinoud II von Geldern, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Sophia van Berthout, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Wilhelm II. von Jülich il 25 dicembre 1362. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 maggio 1405, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Duitsland: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブ

ja.lifeSummary: Marie von Gueldersが約1327年にジェルデルンで生まれた時，父Reinoud II von Geldernは33歳，母Sophia van Berthoutは38歳であった。1362年12月25日にWilhelm II. von Jülichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1405年5月12日に79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie von Guelders(이)가 대략 1327년 글더에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reinoud II von Geldern(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sophia van Berthout(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1362년 12월 25일 Wilhelm II. von Jülich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1405년 5월 12일 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie von Guelders nasceu aproximadamente 1327, em Geldern, seu pai, Reinoud II von Geldern, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Sophia van Berthout, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Wilhelm II. von Jülich em 25 de dezembro de 1362. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1405, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie von Guelders родилась около 1327 г. в местности джелдирн, её отцу по имени Reinoud II von Geldern было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Sophia van Berthout, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wilhelm II. von Jülich 25 декабря 1362 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 мая 1405 г. в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie von Guelders nació aproximadamente 1327, en Geldern, su papá, Reinoud II von Geldern, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Sophia van Berthout, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Wilhelm II. von Jülich el 25 de diciembre de 1362. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1405, a la edad de 79 años.
